title: UK Greetings Birthday Card for Him/Her/Friend - Gold Lettering Design,Black,159mm x 184mm
features: BIRTHDAY CARD - Make any birthday extra special with a thoughtful unique birthday card. A simple yet meaningful way to spread joy and celebration, whatever the age or occasion!
DESIGN - A birthday wish is written in the stars on this striking black happy birthday card, with metallic gold foil and a special insert.
GIFT IDEAS - No matter the occasion, a well - chosen card will make anyone's day. From birthday cards to thank you cards, our collection offers something for every occasion
SIZE - This card measures 15.9 x 18.4cm, ample space for a personal message, and a perfect size for displaying as a keepsake in your home.

HIGH QUALITY & SUSTAINABLE - Our products are crafted from high-quality material, ensuring durability and a premium feel. We use materials from responsibly managed forests and controlled sources, certified by the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC).
description: From the manufacturer Cards for Him Add the finishing touch to his present with our stylish and modern collection of cards Cards for Her Beautifully designed cards with loads of ‘aww factor’ – featuring some of the cutest characters Cards for Kids We offer a huge range of kids’ cards including popular brands such as Disney, Marvel and Star Wars, plus our own exciting and fun looks and characters!
